[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000101001 3
1 001011001 4
2 100101011 5
3 001111011 6
4 101001101 5
5 110010111 6
6 000111001 4
